summary: Make Threadsmith phase closeout outputs explain the functional delta and next phase clearly enough that an operator can judge direction without repeatedly asking what changed or what the next phase will do.

Require `Before / Changed / After / Not changed` for the completed phase.
Add contract verification so future edits cannot silently drop the structure.

phaseName: Threadsmith Role Chain Execution Cadence v1

deliverables: Redefine `drive` as an approved phase role chain, not one role at a time.

Stop mid-chain only on real gates: scope change, blocker, failed

nextPhase: Phase History Read Surface / Summary Output v1
risks: Only 9 reviewed milestone-level historical phases were backfilled; granular historical slices remain intentionally deferred.
Some backfilled completedAt values come from plan file mtime and are suitable for ordering reference, not exact closeout time.
Frontend remains frozen; phase history needs a CLI/skill-readable summary surface before it is easy to inspect.

phaseName: Phase History Read Surface / Summary Output v1
summary: Added a read-only phase history summary surface so operators can inspect prior phases without opening JSONL manually. The command reports total phases, latest phase, result counts, recent phase summaries, and compact next-phase hints.
nextPhase: Phase History Contract Docs / Operator Guidance v1
risks: Summary is CLI/skill-readable only while frontend remains frozen.
Summary can only show phases present in history; not all old granular slices have been backfilled.
Operator docs still need to clarify that phase history is a path ledger, not a complete audit log.
